title: nepeta altimurana
intro: Nepeta altimurana, also known as Altin Penetrant, is a perennial plant species within the Lamiaceae family. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of iridoids, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, offering benefits such as relieving nausea, soothing sore throats, and promoting wound healing. Nepeta altimurana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for convenient and accessible consumption of its medicinal properties.
